seoTitle: Make Your Squarespace Website Multilingual: Guide
metaDescription: Set up multilingual features on your Squarespace site to reach a global audience, with tips on translation tools and language customization.
intro: Reaching visitors in their native language can make a real difference for businesses looking to expand internationally, and Squarespace offers ways to make this happen without coding. This tutorial covers setting up multilingual features, translating content, and customizing language settings so your site can serve a broader audience.

steps.heading: Set up your account for multiple languages
steps.body: Configure your Squarespace account settings to prepare your site for supporting more than one language.

steps.heading: Add language options to your site
steps.body: Add the additional languages you want your website to support so visitors can choose their preferred option.

steps.heading: Translate your content
steps.body: Follow best practices for translating your pages, product descriptions, and other content accurately across languages.

steps.heading: Use AI translation tools for accuracy
steps.body: Integrate AI-assisted translation tools to help ensure your content reflects your brand voice consistently in each language.

steps.heading: Customize language selection for users
steps.body: Set up language selection based on user preferences, such as location or browser settings, for a smoother experience.

faq.question: Do I need coding knowledge to make my site multilingual?
faq.answer: No, the tutorial notes that no prior coding knowledge is required to set this up.

faq.question: Can the site automatically detect a visitor's language?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers automating language selection based on user location or browser settings.

faq.question: Are AI translation tools reliable for brand voice?
faq.answer: The video discusses integrating AI-assisted translation tools to help keep content accurate and aligned with your brand voice.

faq.question: Is this useful for e-commerce businesses specifically?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial highlights how e-commerce businesses can offer product information in multiple languages to reach new markets.

faq.question: Who is this tutorial designed for?
faq.answer: It's designed for both beginners new to website management and professionals looking to expand their site's reach internationally.
